title: coleus kanyakumariensis
intro: Coleus kanyakumariensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the Western Ghats in India. The plant is known to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Coleus kanyakumariensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive disorders.
